hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""' | grep -q 'git commit' && { count=$(git rev-list --count HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo 0); if [ $((count % 5)) -eq 0 ] && [ "$count" -gt 0 ]; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"REVIEW REMINDER: This is commit #'"$count"' (multiple of 5). Review all SUMMARY.md files in TRL tests/ and update TRL tests/TEST_STATUS.md with current findings, hurdles, what has been done, and what still needs to be done."}}'; fi; } || true
